ip_outcome_note: PokemonTCG.io API confirms card id=xy11-10, name='Nuzleaf', nationalPokedexNumbers=[274]. The depicted figure is canonically Nuzleaf, National Pokedex no. 274, a Grass/Dark-type Pokemon. No ambiguity: this is the named species.

trivia_bullets.text: This card is from the XY — Steam Siege set (set code xy11), released 2016-08-03. Steam Siege is the 11th main XY-series expansion and introduced Dual-type Pokemon (cards printed with two types simultaneously) as a mechanics-defining feature. [PokemonTCG.io API: xy11-10]
Flavor text: "It lives deep in forests. With the leaf on its head, it makes a flute whose song makes listeners uneasy." [PokemonTCG.io API: xy11-10, artist: Ayaka Yoshida]

Nuzleaf (National Pokedex no. 274) is the mid-stage in the Seedot evolutionary line: Seedot evolves into Nuzleaf, which evolves into Shiftry. The line's design is rooted in Japanese folklore: Nuzleaf is based on the ko-tengu (small tengu), a yōkai associated with mountain forests and known for its long nose and mischievous nature. Its evolution Shiftry is based on the dai-tengu (great tengu), the more powerful and human-like form. The flute-playing behavior in the Pokedex entries echoes tengu lore of forest guardians who play tricks on humans. [WebSearch: Nuzleaf tengu design, via Pokémon design analysis sources]

This print is a Stage 1 Grass-type with 70 HP. Its attacks are Harden (1 Grass energy, damage-prevention effect capping at 60 damage) and Razor Leaf (2 Colorless energy, 20 damage). Both attacks were legal in Unlimited and Expanded formats as of the API data snapshot. [PokemonTCG.io API: xy11-10]
